name: API Defects (xfail findings)
description: Known API defects documented as findings. Tests assert correct behavior with xfail(strict=True).

name: Floating-Point Precision Issues
description: IEEE 754 double-precision artifacts in price values (F-REST-001, F-WS-002, F-WS-003)

name: Solana Stream Issues
description: Solana transaction stream delivery and filter issues (F-SOL-001, F-SOL-002)

name: Test Infrastructure Failures
description: Transient network errors, timeouts, or test framework issues

name: Product Bugs
description: Unexpected failures that indicate real product defects
